verse_text: By faith Joseph, when he was dying, made mention of the departure of the children of Israel, and gave instructions concerning his bones.

links.context: Joseph was a true prophet, for the Holy Spirit spoke by him. Thus, his prophecies concerning Jacob and his sons came to pass. His long-term prophecy concerning the general resurrection will also come to pass (50:25; [[HEB.11:22]]). Therefore, his prophecies are trustworthy.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: The Holy Spirit spoke by Jacob and predicted that God would bring Joseph back to Canaan. Joseph's bones were later taken to Canaan, prefiguring the resurrection from the dead ([[HEB.11:22]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
